title: Comment from Leavitt Partners, HHS-ONC-2025-0005, HHS-ONC-2025-0005-0001, 2025-23896
comment_text: Attached are the comments and best practices from Leavitt Partners based on the various multi-sector, digital health alliances we operate including: The CARIN Alliance, Pharmacy Interoperability and Clinical Services Alliance (PICSA), The Digital Quality Implementers Community (DQIC), Patient Information Quality Improvement Alliance (PIQI),Alliance for Person-Centered Care, The Oral Health Interoperability Alliance (OHIA), The One Utah Health Collaborative’s Digital Health Pilot, and our work with OSF Healthcare.
